response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a seasoned Staff Software Engineer with over 30 years of professional experience spanning embedded systems, low-latency infrastructure, AI-agent tooling, and platform architecture — a profile that dramatically exceeds the junior-to-mid scope of this role. While the technical stack overlap is genuine (TypeScript, Node.js, React, REST APIs, AWS, Kubernetes, LLM integration), hiring this candidate would be an organizational mismatch: the role offers neither the seniority, autonomy, nor compensation that a Staff-level engineer commands, creating a high likelihood of disengagement or rapid attrition. The resume also shows no explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience, and the relational database mentions are limited to MySQL and MongoDB.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js proficiency demonstrated across multiple production roles including high-throughput and pricing-critical systems
Strong alignment with nice-to-have qualifications: LLM/MCP agent work, AWS CDK, and Kubernetes deployment of own open-source platform
Demonstrated interest in clean architecture, TDD, and knowledge-sharing through workshops and open-source projects
concerns: Severely overqualified — 30+ years of Staff/Senior-level experience is fundamentally incompatible with an entry-level role in terms of expectations, compensation, and growth trajectory
No PostgreSQL experience mentioned; relational database exposure appears limited compared to the role's preference
No Nest.js experience listed, and React experience appears secondary and dated relative to more prominent skills
